summary: Successfully tested Google Maps Embed Code management feature in Admin Site Settings. All features working correctly: field is present in Contact Info tab, live preview shows when URL is entered, settings save to database, and Contact page dynamically uses the saved URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend code correctly implements google_maps_embed field with data-testid='google-maps-embed'
Live preview iframe renders when URL is entered (title='Google Maps Preview')
useSiteSettings hook includes google_maps_embed with proper default fallback URL
Contact page uses settings.google_maps_embed || defaultFallbackURL pattern for graceful degradation
Build cache was an issue - required rm -rf .next && yarn build to see new field in deployed app
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing site settings and test Google Maps URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps Embed feature is fully functional. The field is in Site Settings > Contact Info tab. Important: If new fields are added to site-settings/page.tsx and don't appear in the UI, run 'rm -rf .next && yarn build' to clear Next.js build cache.

admin_site_settings_contact_info_tab.field_label: PASS - Shows 'Google Maps Embed Code' with MapPin icon
admin_site_settings_contact_info_tab.placeholder_text: PASS - Shows hint: 'Paste the Google Maps embed URL here (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=...)'
admin_site_settings_contact_info_tab.helper_text: PASS - Shows instructions: 'Get the embed URL from Google Maps: Share → Embed a map → Copy the src URL from the iframe code'

live_preview.preview_iframe: PASS - iframe with title='Google Maps Preview' appears when URL is entered
live_preview.preview_renders_map: PASS - Map preview shows correctly inside the admin panel

save_functionality.api_retrieve: PASS - GET /api/site-settings returns saved google_maps_embed value

contact_page_integration.uses_dynamic_url: PASS - iframe src uses settings.google_maps_embed from site settings API
contact_page_integration.fallback_works: PASS - Uses default LEXA Lifestyle LLC location URL when field is empty

build_note.issue: Initial test failed because Next.js build cache was serving old code without google_maps_embed field
build_note.fix: Ran 'rm -rf .next && yarn build && sudo supervisorctl restart frontend'
build_note.result: Field now appears correctly in Contact Info tab
